questionHtml: Suggest how benzoic acid, Mr = 122.13, forms an apparent dimer, Mr = 244.26, when dissolved in a non-polar solvent such as hexane.
markschemeHtml:
«intermolecular» hydrogen bonding    [✔]

 

Note: Accept diagram showing hydrogen bonding.
